caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt and a green baseball cap sits in a studio setting, speaking into a professional microphone. He is positioned in front of several banners; one prominently reads "UNIQUE FASHIONS" and another contains the text "ERE BOSSES TA", "IT'S TAI", and "BOUT I". To his right, another person wearing a blue hoodie and a white cap stands facing away from the camera. The background reveals clothing racks and various studio equipment, including a second microphone on a stand. Across the sequence, the man in the green shirt remains in a similar seated position, talking and gesturing slightly with his head and mouth as he speaks. He wears over-ear headphones. A small logo featuring a red circle and the text "BOP" is visible in the bottom corners of the frame. The overall environment appears to be a promotional or podcasting space.
